name: Quantum Health Group Limited
summary: Quantum Health Group Limited distributes medical imaging and patient treatment equipment and services in Australia, Thailand, South Korea, Vietnam, New Zealand, the Philippines, and China. It operates in two segments, Medical and Environmental Services. The company distributes medical products in the field of radiology, oncology, aesthetics, and environmental health. It also manufactures energy saving heat pump technology used for heating and cooling systems internationally. The company was formerly known as Quantum Energy Limited. Quantum Health Group Limited was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Rosebery, Australia.
